title: Shielded Work Capsule
description: Scope + atom allowlist + budget + injected abstract rule. Gate/scoring logic is EXCLUDED (Art. III.4 Goodhart shield). ASCII-only load-bearing keys, no floats (turingos.jcs.v1).

goal_ref.description: accepted_head OID the capsule was built against

intent.description: one-line atom intent (load-bearing scope, not gate logic)

allowed_files.description: the ONLY paths the candidate may touch (scope)

injected_rules.description: ONLY the relevant abstract FailureClass rules (shield). Raw failure payloads / worker stdout / unrelated rules are FORBIDDEN here.

rule.description: abstract rule text, e.g. 'declared tests must include boundary case X'

acceptance_commands.description: declared tests, FROZEN before dispatch — predicate P6 re-runs these
